data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. FAST LOVE hasn't been far away here at the last two, finding the frame both times, most recently when second beaten 1.3 lengths (16.91). Nicely placed to grab a well-deserved win. 2. HAPPY CHICK failed to feature last start after missing the jump at this track, but prior to that won by one length at this track (16.86) beating Search History in a Grade 5 on April 10. Can measure up this time. 1. THERMAL IGNITION showed strong early pace from the wide draw and stuck on well despite missing the frame, finishing sixth over 300m this track in 17.16. Comes through a solid form race last start. Key player if finds best. 3. GETTING NERVOUS is in the mix despite missing out at this track last time.","runners":[8,2,1,3],"exclusive":false}
